channel.title: Plugins on Badran Elshenawy
channel.description: Recent content in Plugins on Badran Elshenawy

item.title: Claude Series – Post 13: claude-mem - Give Claude Code a Brain That Remembers!
item.description: Post 13 in the Claude series. Every Claude Code session starts from zero — claude-mem fixes that with automatic context capture, AI compression, and token-efficient progressive disclosure search.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 9: Plugins - The App Store Claude Code Was Missing!
item.description: Stop configuring everything manually! Claude Code’s plugin ecosystem gives you 9,000+ one-command installs that bundle skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers - from automated code review to real-time documentation injection.
